content:
MODULE: cosmos.memory.memory_system
FILE: cosmos/memory/memory_system.py (750 lines)
CATEGORY: memory

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Memory System - Unified Memory Interface

Integrates all memory components:
- Virtual Context (working memory paging)
- Working Memory (scratchpad)
- Archival Memory (long-term storage)
- Recall Memory (conversation history)
- Knowledge Graph (entity relationships)
- Memory Dreaming (consolid

CLASSES:
- QueryCache: Simple LRU cache for memory queries with TTL support.

Features:
- LRU eviction 
  Methods: def get(self, query: str, **kwargs) -> Optional[Any]
  Methods: def set(self, query: str, value: Any, **kwargs)
  Methods: def invalidate(self, query: Optional[str]=None)
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict
- PhiInvariantEncoder: CST Phi-Invariant Memory Encoder.

Converts vector embeddings to spherical coord
  Methods: def encode_to_spherical(self, vector: list[float]) -> tuple[float, float, float]
  Methods: def decode_from_spherical(self, r: float, theta: float, phi: float, target_dim: int=3) -> list[float
  Methods: def validate_drift(self, current_phase: float, new_phase: float) -> bool
  Methods: def set_context_phase(self, phase: float)
  Methods: def get_context_phase(self) -> Optional[float]
  Methods: def calculate_memory_phase(self, content: str, embedding: Optional[list[float]]=None) -> float
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict
- MemorySearchResult: Unified search result across all memory systems.
- MemorySystem: Unified memory system integrating all memory components.

Provides a single inte
  Methods: async def initialize(self)
  Methods: async def shutdown(self)
  Methods: def set_embedding_function(self, embed_fn: Callable)
  Methods: async def remember(self, content: str, tags: Optional[list[str]]=None, importance: float=0.5, metada
  Methods: async def recall(self, query: str, top_k: int=5, search_archival: bool=True, search_conversation: bo
  Methods: async def forget(self, memory_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def add_conversation_turn(self, role: str, content: str, metadata: Optional[dict]=None) -> Con
  Methods: async def get_conversation_context(self, max_turns: int=10) -> str

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_memory_system(data_dir: str='./data') -> MemorySystem
